first_run.rationale: The core evaluation, including the score, justification, and primary concerns, remains identical between the two versions. The only significant change is the substitution of one minor concern ("No mention of Windows platform experience") for another ("Lack of SQL Server and Oracle experience"). This change is not tied to the age-related date shift and falls within the scope of normal run-to-run variation in how the model words minor details.
